name: chemag-vscode-lsp-server
description: Chemag LSP server — wraps @chemag/core's check-edit engine and serves diagnostics + quick-fix code actions over the Language Server Protocol. Bundled inside the chemag-vscode extension; can also be spawned directly by non-VS Code editors (Zed/Helix/Neovim) via `node node_modules/chemag-vscode/server/dist/server.js` over stdio.
